steps: Add 1 L Milli-Q H 2 O to a clean media bottle
Add 0.232 g Ca(NO 3 ) 2 *4H 2 O calcium nitrate Contributed by users
Add 0.01 g K 2 HPO 4 Potassium phosphate (dibasic) P212121
Add 0.025 g MgSO 4 *7H 2 O Magnesium Sulfate P212121
Add 0.02 g Na 2 CO 3 Sodium carbonate P212121
Add 0.044 g Na 2 SiO 3 *5H 2 O Sodium metasilicate Contributed by users
Add 3.5 mg Citric acid Citric Acid P212121
Add 1 mL of Metal solution Chu's-10 Metal Solution by Steven W Wilhelm
If making agar, add 15 g to media
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
